title: Pistachio Crusted Australian Lamb Chops
description: A flavorful and crispy lamb dish inspired by Australian cuisine, with a crunchy pistachio crust. This recipe serves 4 and can be cooked in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Season the lamb chops with salt and pepper.
In a shallow dish, mix together pistachio meal and crispy breadcrumbs.
Dip each lamb chop into the pistachio mixture, coating evenly.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb chops for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the lamb reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
